3.4.0.en:
new options to charge vehicle up to a specified SoC
new option to stop charging at a certain SoC

drop dependencies to chai, sinon and mocha

neue Optionen zum Aufladen von Fahrzeugen bis zu einer bestimmten SoC
neue Möglichkeit, das Laden an einer bestimmten SoC zu stoppen
heben adapter-dev-version von 1.4 bis 1.5
abhängigkeiten von chai, sinon und mocha

сбросить зависимости от чаи, синуса и моча

nuove opzioni per caricare il veicolo fino a un SoC specificato

nuevas opciones para cargar el vehículo hasta un SoC especificado
nueva opción para dejar de cargar en un determinado SoC

将车辆充电至特定索C的新选项
停止在某个 SOC 充电的新选项
将适配器版本从1.4提高到1.5

3.3.0.en:
new option to always charge with 1p oder 3p
new setting for discharging power of storage battery (if not equal to max battery power)
updated version requirements (admin 7.6.17 and core 3.3.2)
3.3.0.de:
Neue Option zum immer Laden mit 1p oder 3p.
Neue Einstellung für die Entladeleistung des Speicherakkus (wenn diese nicht der maximalen Akkuleistung entspricht)
Aktualisierte Versionsanforderungen (Admin 7.6.17 und Core 3.3.2)
3.3.0.ru:
Новая опция для всегда заряжать с 1p или 3p.
новая настройка для разряда хранящейся энергии аккумулятора (если не равна максимальной мощности аккумулятора)
требования к обновленной версии (admin 7.6.17 и core 3.3.2)
3.3.0.pt:
nova opção para sempre carregar com 1p ou 3p
nova configuração para descarga de energia da bateria de armazenamento (se não for igual à potência máxima da bateria)
atualizados requisitos da versão (admin 7.6.17 e core 3.3.2)
3.3.0.nl:
Nieuwe optie om altijd op te laden met 1-fase of 3-fase.
Nieuwe instelling voor het ontladen van de energie van de opslagbatterij (indien niet gelijk aan het maximale batterijvermogen)
bijgewerkte versievereisten (admin 7.6.17 en core 3.3.2)
3.3.0.fr:
nouvelle option pour toujours charger avec 1p ou 3p
nouveau paramètre pour décharger la puissance de la batterie de stockage (si elle n'est pas égale à la puissance maximale de la batterie)
exigences de version mises à jour (admin 7.6.17 et core 3.3.2)
3.3.0.it:
nuova opzione per caricare sempre con 1p o 3p
nuova impostazione per la potenza di scarica della batteria di accumulo (se diversa dalla potenza massima della batteria)
requisiti della versione aggiornati (admin 7.6.17 e core 3.3.2)
3.3.0.es:
nueva opción para cargar siempre con 1p o 3p
nueva configuración para la descarga de energía de la batería de almacenamiento (si no es igual a la potencia máxima de la batería)
actualizados requisitos de versión (admin 7.6.17 y core 3.3.2)
3.3.0.pl:
Nowa opcja umożliwiająca zawsze ładowanie za pomocą 1p lub 3p.
nowa opcja ustawienia rozładowania mocy baterii magazynowej (jeśli nie jest równa maksymalnej mocy baterii)
zaktualizowane wymagania wersji (admin 7.6.17 i rdzeń 3.3.2)
3.3.0.uk:
нова опція завжди заряджати з 1ф або 3ф
нове налаштування для розрядки потужності акумулятору (якщо воно не дорівнює максимальній потужності акумулятора)
оновлені вимоги версії (адмін 7.6.17 та ядро 3.3.2)
3.3.0.zh-cn:
新选项：始终使用1p或3p进行充电
存储电池放电功率的新设置（如果不等于最大电池功率）
更新版本要求（管理员7.6.17和核心3.3.2）

3.2.0.en:
new option to always start charging when vehicle is plugged if authorization is required to prevent charging station to block charging
optimized strategy for battery charging
node.js >= 20 required
3.2.0.de:
neue option, immer zu starten lade, wenn das fahrzeug gesteckt wird, wenn die berechtigung erforderlich ist, ladestation zu blockieren lade
optimierte strategie für batterielade
node.js >= 20 erforderlich
3.2.0.ru:
новая возможность всегда начинать зарядку при подключении транспортного средства, если требуется разрешение для предотвращения блокировки зарядки зарядной станции
оптимизированная стратегия зарядки аккумулятора
node.js >= 20 обязательных
3.2.0.pt:
nova opção para sempre começar a carregar quando o veículo é ligado se a autorização é necessária para evitar a estação de carregamento para bloquear a carga
estratégia otimizada para carregamento de bateria
nó.js >= 20
3.2.0.nl:
nieuwe optie om altijd te beginnen met opladen wanneer het voertuig is aangesloten als er een vergunning is vereist om te voorkomen dat laadstation te blokkeren laden
geoptimaliseerde strategie voor het opladen van batterijen
knooppunten < 20 vereist
3.2.0.fr:
nouvelle option pour toujours commencer la recharge lorsque le véhicule est branché si l'autorisation est nécessaire pour empêcher la borne de recharge de bloquer la recharge
stratégie optimisée pour le chargement de la batterie
node.js >= 20 requis
3.2.0.it:
nuova opzione per avviare sempre la ricarica quando il veicolo è collegato se l'autorizzazione è necessaria per evitare la stazione di ricarica per bloccare la ricarica
strategia ottimizzata per la ricarica della batteria
node.js >= 20 richiesto
3.2.0.es:
nueva opción para comenzar siempre la carga cuando el vehículo está conectado si se requiere autorización para evitar la estación de carga para bloquear la carga
estrategia optimizada para la carga de baterías
node.js= 20 requerido
3.2.0.pl:
nowa opcja, aby zawsze rozpocząć ładowanie, gdy pojazd jest podłączony, jeśli wymagane jest zezwolenie, aby uniemożliwić stacji ładowania do blokowania ładowania
zoptymalizowana strategia ładowania akumulatorów
node.js > = 20 wymaganych
3.2.0.uk:
новий варіант, щоб завжди почати заряджання, коли автомобіль підключений, якщо авторизація необхідна для запобігання зарядки станції для блокування зарядки
оптимізована стратегія зарядки акумулятора
node.js >= 20 потрібно
3.2.0.zh-cn:
如果需要授权以防止充电站阻塞充电,则在车辆被堵塞时总是开始充电的新选项
电池充电的优化策略
需要20个节点

3.1.0.en:
new option to reduce log entries on info level (write them with debug level)
fix wording error ("regard" changed to grid consumption)
fixed some english translations
renamed state "regardTimestamp" to "consumptionTimestamp" - please delete old state
3.1.0.de:
neue option, um log-einträge auf info-ebene zu reduzieren (schreiben sie sie mit debug-ebene)
fix-wortungsfehler ("regard" geändert zum netzverbrauch)
einige englische übersetzungen
umbenannt Zustand "regardTimestamp" zu "consumptionTimestamp" - bitte löschen alten Zustand
3.1.0.ru:
новый вариант сокращения входов в журнал на информационном уровне (запись их с помощью уровня отладки)
исправление ошибки формулировки («в зависимости от» изменено на потребление сетки)
некоторые английские переводы
переименовано в "regardTimestamp" - пожалуйста, удалите старое состояние
3.1.0.pt:
nova opção para reduzir entradas de log no nível info (escreve-as com nível de depuração)
corrigir erro de redação ("regard" alterado para consumo de grade)
fixo algumas traduções em inglês
renomeado estado "regardTimestamp" para "consumptionTimestamp" - por favor excluir estado velho
3.1.0.nl:
nieuwe optie om log items te verminderen op infoniveau (schrijf ze met debug level)
fout in de formulering vast te stellen ("veranderd in netverbruik")
enkele engelse vertalingen gerepareerd
hernoemde staat "respectTimestamp" naar "consumptionTimestamp" - verwijder oude staat
3.1.0.fr:
nouvelle option pour réduire les entrées de journal au niveau info (écrire avec le niveau de débogage)
corriger l'erreur de formulation ("regard" changé à la consommation du réseau)
corrigé quelques traductions anglaises
rebaptisé état "regardTimestamp" vers "consommationTimestamp" - veuillez supprimer l'ancien état
3.1.0.it:
nuova opzione per ridurre le voci di registro sul livello info (scrivile con livello di debug)
correzione errore di wording ("regard" cambiato in consumo di griglia)
fisso alcune traduzioni in inglese
ribattezzato stato "regardTimestamp" a "consumTimestamp" - si prega di eliminare vecchio stato
3.1.0.es:
nueva opción para reducir las entradas de registro en el nivel de información (escribirlas con nivel de depuración)
corregir error de redacción ("regard" cambiado al consumo de red)
fijo algunas traducciones de inglés
renombrado estado "regardTimestamp" a "consumptionTimestamp" - por favor eliminar viejo estado
3.1.0.pl:
nowa opcja zmniejszenia wpisów dziennika na poziomie informacji (napisz je na poziomie debugowania)
błąd sformułowania ("regard" zmieniony na zużycie sieci)
naprawił kilka angielskich tłumaczeń
przemianowany stan "regardTimestamp" na "consumptionTimestamp" - usuń stary stan
3.1.0.uk:
новий варіант для зменшення записів журналу на рівні інформації (записати їх на рівні debug)
виправлено помилку словосполучення ("regard" змінено до споживання сітки)
виправлено деякі англійські переклади
перейменований стан "regardTimestamp" до "consumptionTimestamp" - будь ласка, видаліть старий стан
3.1.0.zh-cn:
在信息级别上减少日志条目的新选项( 用调试级别写入)
固定措辞错误 (“ 注意” 改为网格消耗)
修复一些英语翻译
请删除旧状态

titleLang.en: Control Keba KeContact P20 or P30 or BMW i wallbox

titleLang.pt: Controle Keba KeContact P20 ou P30 ou caixa de embutir BMW i
titleLang.nl: Bedien Keba KeContact P20 of P30 of BMW i wallbox
titleLang.fr: Commande Keba KeContact P20 ou P30 ou BMW i wallbox
titleLang.it: Controlla Keba KeContact P20 o P30 o BMW i wallbox
titleLang.es: Control Keba KeContact P20 o P30 o caja de empotrar BMW i
titleLang.pl: Sterowanie Keba KeContact P20 lub P30 lub BMW i wallbox
titleLang.zh-cn: 控制 Keba KeContact P20 或 P30 或 BMW i wallbox
titleLang.uk: Керуйте Keba KeContact P20 або P30 або BMW i wallbox

desc.en: Control your charging station and use automatic regulation e.g. to charge your vehicle by photovoltaic surplus
desc.de: Steuern Sie Ihre Ladestation und nutzen Sie die automatische Regelung z.B.
desc.ru: Управляйте своей зарядной станцией и используйте автоматическое регулирование, например
desc.pt: Controle sua estação de carregamento e use a regulação automática, por exemplo
desc.nl: Bedien uw laadstation en gebruik automatische regeling, b.v.
desc.fr: Contrôlez votre borne de recharge et utilisez la régulation automatique, par ex.
desc.it: Controlla la tua stazione di ricarica e usa la regolazione automatica, ad es.
desc.es: Controle su estación de carga y utilice la regulación automática, p. Ej.
desc.pl: Kontroluj swoją stację ładowania i korzystaj z automatycznej regulacji m.in.
desc.zh-cn: 控制您的充电站并使用自动调节，例如
desc.uk: Керуйте своєю зарядною станцією та використовуйте автоматичне регулювання, напр. щоб зарядити свій автомобіль від надлишку фотоелектричної енергії

common.name: Product ID
common.desc: Model name (variant)

states.0: no phase toggle source is available
no time quality, clock never set
states.2: clock set and synchronized but not reliable
states.3: clock set and synchronized reliable (NTP, OCC, ...)

common.name: Hex Value of Dip Switch 1 Setting
Hex Value of Dip Switch 2 Setting
State
common.desc: Current state of the wallbox

states.2: ready for charging, waiting for vehicle
states.5: charging temporarily interrupted due temperature, RFID auth or other

common.name: Error 1
common.desc: Detail code for state 4; exceptions see FAQ on www.kecontact.com

common.name: Error 2
common.desc: Detail code for state 4 exception #6 see FAQ on www.kecontact.com

common.name: Plug
common.desc: Current condition of the loading connection

states.1: cable plugged in charging station, unlocked
states.3: cable plugged in charging station and locked
states.5: cable plugged in charging station and vehicle, unlocked
states.7: cable plugged in charging station and vehicle and locked

common.name: Enable System
common.desc: Enable state for charging (contains Enable input, RFID, UDP,..).

common.name: Enable User
common.desc: Enable condition via UDP.

common.name: Maximum Current
common.desc: Current preset value via Control pilot in milliampere.

common.name: Maximum Current Percent
common.desc: Current preset value via Control pilot in % of the PWM value.

common.name: Maximum Current Hardware
common.desc: Highest possible charging current of the charging connection.

common.name: Current User
common.desc: Current preset value of the user via UDP; Default = 63000mA.

common.name: Current for Timer
common.desc: Current value in mA that will replace the setting in the “Curr user” field as soon as “Tmo CT” expires.

common.name: timeout Current Timer
common.desc: Timeout in seconds before the current setting defined by the last currtime command will be applied.

common.name: Current Failsafe
common.desc: Current preset value for the Failsafe function.

common.name: Current Failsafe Timer
common.desc: Communication timeout before triggering the Failsafe function.

common.name: Output
common.desc: State of the relay output X2.

common.name: Input
common.desc: State of the potential free Enable input X1.

common.name: Uptime
common.desc: Current system clock since restart of the wallbox.

common.name: Voltage 1
common.desc: Current voltage in V of phase 1.

common.name: Voltage 2
common.desc: Current voltage in V of phase 2.

common.name: Voltage 3
common.desc: Current voltage in V of phase 3.

common.name: Current 1
common.desc: Current current value in mA of phase 1.

common.name: Current 2
common.desc: Current current value in mA of phase 2.

common.name: Current 3
common.desc: Current current value in mA of phase 3.

common.name: Power
common.desc: Current power in mW (Real Power).

common.name: Power Factor
common.desc: Power factor in % (cosphi)

common.name: Power Consumption
common.desc: Power consumption of the current loading session in Wh.

common.name: Total Power Consumption
common.desc: Total power consumption (persistent) without current loading session in Wh.

common.name: Energy Value to Charge into Battery
common.desc: Energy value in Wh defined by the last setenergy command. Max. value is 99999999 Wh (higher values will cause a counter overflow).

common.name: Authorization Function active
common.desc: Indicates if the Authorization Function is activated

common.name: Authorization via RFID required
common.desc: Authorization is neccesary (box locked) or already done

common.name: Text to display on wallbox
common.desc: Message to display on wallbox for a certain (short) time (max. 23 characters)

common.name: number of report to be obtained
common.desc: Number of report (1-3, 1xx) to get from charging station

common.name: authorize wallbox
common.desc: enter 8 byte hex for RFID tag and 10 byte hex for RFID class to authorize for charging

common.name: deauthorize wallbox
common.desc: enter 8 byte hex for RFID tag to deauthorize from charging

common.name: manually set date and time of charging station
common.desc: with internet connection time is set by NTP, it can also be set manually in seconds (unix epoch time)

common.name: unlock socket of charging station
common.desc: The command unlock unlocks the socket of the device. The charging process has to be stopped first (e.g. via currtime 0 1 or ena 0)

common.name: pause charging of vehicle
common.desc: Switch to stop charging of vehicle. This switch has higher priority than photovoltaics and should be used to stop charging of vehicle

common.name: photovoltaics automatic enabled
common.desc: Switch to load vehicle according to surplus of photovoltaics (true); otherwise load with maximum power (false).

common.name: additional grid consumption to run charging session
common.desc: amount of watts to be used as grid consumption to start charging session

common.name: limit dynamic charging to this value of amperage (0 = no limitation)
common.desc: The amount of dynamic charing current will be limited to this value (0 = no limitation)

common.name: limit dynamic charging to this value of amperage in case of using 1p 3p switch ans set to 1 (0 = use limitation from limitCurrent)
common.desc: The amount of dynamic charing current will be limited to this value if 1p 3p switch is set to 1p (0 = use limitation from limitCurrent))

common.name: count of phases to calculate with for KeContact Deutschland-Edition
common.desc: Keba charging station KeContact Deutschland-Edition has no energy meter. Therefore the adapter cannot measure power comsuptions of vehicle. The help estimation please enter number of phases here.

common.name: define whether to charge with 1p or 3p
common.desc: Set option to charge with 1p or 3p regardless of surplus (0 = automatic by surplus)

common.name: strategy to use for battery storage (1-4)
common.desc: Dynamic value which strategy should be used for battery storage

states.0: none (use strategy set in adapter settings)
states.1: do not use battery storage (priority on vehicle)
states.2: do not use battery storgae (priority on battery)
states.3: use battery storage for minimal charging of vehicle
states.4: full use of battery for charging vehicle

common.name: SoC of battery storage above which battery power is used for charging
common.desc: With this state you can dynamically set a value of SoC (state of charge) above with battery storage can be used for charging vehicle

common.name: name of state holding SoC of vehicle currently to be charged
common.desc: You can specify a state name that holds SoC (state of charge) of a vehicle to be charged. Needed for charging up to a target SoC

common.name: vehicle shall be charged to that SoC without PV automatics
common.desc: Set this value to temporarily charge vehicle without PV automatics unless vehicle SoC (state of charge) has reached this value

common.name: charging up to SoC of vehicle
common.desc: charging of vehicle stops when SoC (state of charge) has reached this value

common.name: reset target SoC after reaching this value
common.desc: set this option if taget SoC should be cleared after target SoC is reached by vehible

common.name: current available firmware version on keba.com
common.desc: current version of firmware found on keba.com website

common.name: version of last admin notification about new firmware
common.desc: cache to prevent adapter to repeatedly notify admin about new firmware if there is no change in available firmware version

common.name: current surplus for PV automatics
common.desc: Surplus used for last calculation of PV automatics

common.name: maximum power for wallbox
common.desc: maximum amount of watts available for charging station in case of power limitation

common.name: maximum amperage for wallbox
common.desc: maximum amount of mA available for charging station in case of amperage limitation

common.name: number of current charging phases
common.desc: number of phases with which vehicle is currently charging

common.name: timestamp when vehicle was pluged to wallbox
common.desc: date and time when car was last plugged to wallbox, null if unplugged

common.name: timestamp when vehicle started to charge
common.desc: date and time when car was first started to charge after plugged to wallbox, null if not charging

common.name: timestamp when vehicle was plugged and charging was authorized
common.desc: date and time when vehicle was plugged to wallbox and neccessary authorization was successfel

common.name: timestamp when charging session was continued with grid consumption
common.desc: date and time when charging was continued even when there were no longer a surplus

common.name: timestamp when 1p3pSw was changed
common.desc: date and time when last phase switch occured

common.name: timestamp when last charging process was started
common.desc: date and time when car was plugged to wallbox for last charging process

common.name: timestamp when last charging process was finished
common.desc: date and time when car was unplugged from wallbox for last charging process

common.name: charge amount of last charging process
common.desc: Power consumption of the last loading session in Wh.

common.name: session ID of current charging session
common.desc: unique session ID

common.name: RFID tag of current charging session
common.desc: RFID token used for charging session

common.name: RFID class of current charging session
common.desc: RFID class used for charging session

common.name: internal data for communication between instances
wallbox message exchange
common.desc: messages received from other instances for this wallbox

description.en: This notification informs about new available firmware updates.
description.de: Diese Benachrichtigung informiert über neue verfügbare Firmware-Updates.
description.ru: Это уведомление информирует о новых доступных обновлениях прошивки.
description.pt: Esta notificação informa sobre novas atualizações de firmware disponíveis.
description.nl: Deze kennisgeving informeert over nieuwe beschikbare firmware updates.
description.fr: Cette notification informe sur les nouvelles mises à jour firmware disponibles.
description.it: Questa notifica informa su nuovi aggiornamenti firmware disponibili.
description.es: Esta notificación informa sobre nuevas actualizaciones de firmware disponibles.
description.pl: Niniejsze powiadomienie informuje o nowych dostępnych aktualizacjach oprogramowania firmowego.
description.uk: Це повідомлення повідомляє про нові доступні оновлення мікропрограми.
description.zh-cn: 本通知通报新的可用固件更新情况.

description.en: A new firmware update is available.
description.pt: Uma nova atualização de firmware está disponível.
description.nl: Een nieuwe firmware update is beschikbaar.
description.fr: Une nouvelle mise à jour du firmware est disponible.
description.it: È disponibile un nuovo aggiornamento firmware.
description.es: Está disponible una nueva actualización de firmware.
description.pl: Nowa aktualizacja oprogramowania firmowego jest dostępna.
